posts.author: Tapology
posts.body: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 9 of 9 Pending | Tied for 1st with 147 others Odilov vs. ErmekovFaridun Odilov, TKO, R2Odilov is really good but he has smoker cardio. In 3 round fights he should be fine. Ermekov is good but I think Odilov is much betterKomilov vs. MusaevFurkat Komilov, DECMusaev has aura but idk his record is pretty sus. Heavily padded and he has some sus results like tha split decision or the ko 3 over BandanaEsengulov vs. MagomedovEdil Esengulov, TKO, R3Esengulov has so much aura. Idk how to feel about him at 185 since his frame is small but he is a monster of a fighter. The only guy he’s lost to recently is Vagaev, who’s now ufc bound. Issyk-Kul Dragon will mogElzhurkaev vs. AbdulkhalikovAli Abdulkhalikov, DECThis is a sick fight, both of these guys are really skilled. Ali suffered bad B2B losses but the Batista one was just a really bad matchup. Amir has the ability to sniff him but i think Ali is more well roundedKenjebekov vs. BoraevShamil Boraev, DECBoraev is pretty good imo. He was out hustling Osmanli before getting subbed and hasn’t lost since
